_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Excel-not-installed (branch 1) of the excel-activities/excel-application-card-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException 'Error opening workbook. Make sure Excel is installed.' on ExcelApplicationScope_1) → jobs logs (host scope acquisition Trace lines: COM CLSID lookup for Excel.Application returns CO_E_CLASSSTRING / no excel.exe found on host) → workflow source. The Classic Excel Application Scope on a headless Robot host (no Excel install) is the smoking gun.
